title: leptoclinium fruticosum
intro: Leptoclinium fruticosum, also known as the climbing heliotrope or bushy heliotrope, is a species of flowering plant in the bignonia family, native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Leptoclinium fruticosum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a wound-healing agent and anti-pesticidal properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use, with the leaves and stems being the most commonly used parts for herbal preparations.
